question: When are performance reviews conducted?
ground_truth_answer: Performance reviews are conducted annually in December, and mid-year reviews take place in June.
relevant_chunks: - Performance reviews are conducted annually in December.
- Mid-year reviews take place in June to track goals.

question: How many days of remote work are permitted?
ground_truth_answer: Remote work is permitted up to 2 days per week with manager approval.
relevant_chunks: - Remote work is permitted up to 2 days per week with manager approval.

question: How many days of paid sick leave am I entitled to?
ground_truth_answer: Employees are entitled to 10 days of paid sick leave per year.
relevant_chunks: - Sick Leave: Employees are entitled to 10 days of paid sick leave per year; long-term sickness requires a medical certificate and coordination with HR.

question: Can I carry over unused annual leave to the next year?
ground_truth_answer: Yes, up to 5 unused days may be carried into the following year with manager approval, but they must be used within the first 90 days of the new year.
relevant_chunks: - Up to 5 unused days may be carried into the following year with manager approval.
- Any carried-over days must be used within the first 90 days of the new year or they will expire.

question: How many days of paid annual leave do full-time employees get?
ground_truth_answer: Full-time employees get 20 days of paid annual leave per year.
relevant_chunks: - Full-time employees: 20 days per year, prorated for part-time staff.

question: Is alcohol a reimbursable expense?
ground_truth_answer: No, alcohol is not reimbursable unless associated with approved client entertainment.
relevant_chunks: - Personal expenses, family travel, fines (parking, traffic), and alcohol not associated with approved client entertainment.

question: Within how many days should expense reports be submitted?
ground_truth_answer: Expense reports should be submitted within 30 days of the expense date.
relevant_chunks: - Expense reports should be submitted within 30 days of the expense date.

question: Who needs to approve expenses above $500?
ground_truth_answer: Expenses above $500 require both manager and finance approval before reimbursement.
relevant_chunks: - Expenses above $500 require manager and finance approval before reimbursement.

question: Do I need multi-factor authentication?
ground_truth_answer: Yes, multi-factor authentication (MFA) is required for all corporate accounts.
relevant_chunks: - Multi-factor authentication (MFA) is required for all corporate accounts.

question: Where should I report phishing emails?
ground_truth_answer: Suspected phishing emails should be reported immediately to security@company.example.
relevant_chunks: - Report suspected phishing emails immediately to security@company.example and delete them.

question: What is the hotel booking cap for standard business destinations?
ground_truth_answer: Hotel bookings are capped at $200 per night for standard business destinations.
relevant_chunks: - Hotel bookings are capped at $200 per night for standard business destinations.

question: Can I book a business class flight for an international trip?
ground_truth_answer: Yes, business class is permitted for international flights exceeding 6 hours with VP approval.
